afterSnapshot.name: testComputeLegRiskScore

verification.description: Unit-tests the per-leg risk scorer: factor isolation, roll-up/level tiers, ETA growth with cumulative hours + headwind/strong wind, edge cases, and factor shape.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The new explainable scorer needs unit coverage: each factor in isolation, roll-up + tiers, ETA growth with time and wind reliability, edge cases, and factor shape.
implementation: Pure-function test calling computeLegRiskScore via functions.call with explicit weights and fixed epoch-based sun times so it is independent of config and wall-clock.
